findings.invariant_violated: The written word claims as enforced only what something actually enforces.
findings.evidence: The README states 'all inputs are validated at the boundary,' but the request handlers accept unvalidated payloads; nothing enforces the claimed guarantee.
findings.why_proof_missed: Documentation is not tested against behavior, so the drift between claim and enforcement went unnoticed.
findings.root_correction: Either enforce validation at the boundary or correct the documentation to match reality.
